ddls:
CREATE TABLE "market_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market data entry */,
  "instrument_id" TEXT /* Identifier for the financial instrument */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the data entry */,
  "time" TEXT /* Time of the data entry */,
  "residual_no_winsor_cum_return" REAL /* Residual cumulative return without Winsorization */,
  "raw_no_winsor_cum_return" REAL /* Raw cumulative return without Winsorization */,
  "residual_winsor_cum_return" REAL /* Residual cumulative return with Winsorization */,
  "raw_winsor_cum_return" REAL /* Raw cumulative return with Winsorization */,
  "high" REAL /* Highest price of the instrument during the time period */,
  "low" REAL /* Lowest price of the instrument during the time period */,
  "open" REAL /* Opening price of the instrument during the time period */,
  "close" REAL /* Closing price of the instrument during the time period */,
  "volume" REAL /* Trading volume of the instrument during the time period */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_data_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES instruments ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "instruments" (
  "instrument_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each financial instrument */,
  "instrument_name" TEXT /* Name of the financial instrument */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the financial instrument */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the financial instrument */,
  "exchange" TEXT /* Exchange where the instrument is listed */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector of the instrument */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry of the instrument */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user's role */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "role_permissions" (
  "role_permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the role-permission mapping */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* ID of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_role_permissions_permission_id FOREIGN KEY ("permission_id") REFERENCES permissions ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_role_permissions_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the market data being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Time when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_access_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES market_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the report */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the report */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the report */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the report was created */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the market data used in the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., market trends, instrument performance) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES market_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "instrument_id" TEXT /* Identifier for the financial instrument */,
  "condition" TEXT /* Condition that triggered the alert */,
  "alert_time" TEXT /* Time when the alert was triggered */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message content of the alert */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., threshold breach, anomaly detection) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES instruments ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alert_configurations" (
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert configuration */,
  "instrument_id" TEXT /* Identifier for the financial instrument */,
  "condition" TEXT /* Condition for the alert (e.g., price, return) */,
  "threshold" REAL /* Threshold value for the alert condition */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., threshold breach, anomaly detection) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("config_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alert_configurations_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES instruments ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "collaborations" (
  "collaboration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collaboration project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the collaboration project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the collaboration project */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the project was created */,
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project owner */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collaboration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_owner_id FOREIGN KEY ("owner_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "collaboration_members" (
  "member_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collaboration member */,
  "collaboration_id" INTEGER /* ID of the collaboration project */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user participating in the project */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the project (e.g., admin, contributor) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("member_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaboration_members_collaboration_id FOREIGN KEY ("collaboration_id") REFERENCES collaborations ("collaboration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaboration_members_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dataset_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset version */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the market data */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date when the dataset version was created */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dataset_versions_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES market_data ("data_id")
)
